name: Nightmare universe
description:
The Nightmare Series (also known as the Nightmare Universe, the Nightmare Trilogy, and Nightmare Version) is a series of fangames by Jaiz Koys, Mastered Ultra Instinct Kostas and Danuha2526 based on the original Sonic.exe indie game, though it is very different from the original game in many ways, such as having genuine plots and lore. The universe has games and animations! The main line being: Sonic.exe Nightmare Beginning, Finished Nightmare, Exetior's Nightmares, Outcast Massacre, Shadow manace, Everywhere at the end of NU, Continued Nightmare Eye of three and Cover story

Warning! this may have gore and sexual content (blame sark) so get ready for it or just dont talk with it... maybe i will work with a safe for work ver if yall want to The bot is still in beta! If theres anything to fix please tell me! I will be checking it almost everyday! Enjoy ^_^
